notes: lotuscars.com/en-US is the consumer site and is WebFetch-accessible (verified 2026-05-13). Image assets live on media.lotuscars.com which 301-redirects to lotuscars.com/en/press/galleries/<model>; press fallback root is lotuscars.com/en/press. Three US models: Emira (ICE sports car), Eletre (EV SUV, Carbon-only trim), Emeya (EV sedan, R-only trim). Evija (electric hypercar) correctly excluded from catalog.
